---
title: "A Storehouse of Stories, Volume 1"
sort_title: "Storehouse of Stories, Volume 1"
slug: "storehouse_of_stories_1"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---




[Click here to access and download*A Storehouse of Stories*volume 1 (1870) online in various formats.  
Scan from Bodleian Library, Oxford](http://ia311207.us.archive.org/0/items/storehouseofstor00yong/)

[Click here to access and download*A Storehouse of Stories*volume 2 (1872) online in various formats.  
Scan from Bodleian Library, Oxford](http://ia311027.us.archive.org/3/items/astorehousestor01yonggoog/)

Yonge edited two volumes of A Storehouse of Stories, the first in 1870 and the second in 1872  
Both are now available online (see above)

#### Volume 1 Contents

#### The history of Philip Quarll

#### Goody Twoshoes

#### The governess

#### Jemima Placid

#### The perambulations of a mouse

#### The village school

#### The little queen

#### History of little Jack

#### Volume 2 Contents

####   
Family stories ; or, evenings at my grandmother's

#### Elements of morality

#### A puzzle for a curious girl

#### The blossoms of morality
